metadata.description: Generates normal map from height/grayscale texture using finite differences

summary: Converts a height map or grayscale texture to normal vectors using bump mapping. Approximates surface detail without actual geometry displacement.

parameters.Distance: Finite difference offset for normal calculation

algorithm: Bump mapping using height gradient approximation - derivative-based normal generation

implementation.approach: Custom function or series of offset samples
unity_nodes: CustomFunction with ddx/ddy or manual offset sampling

complexity: Requires shader math knowledge - UV offset sampling or built-in derivatives
compatibility_loss_25_percent: Exact algorithm differs between Blender and HLSL; visual results similar but not identical
typical_use: Rock texture detail, worn surfaces, fabric weave, fine scratches
